tasks.label: Build: Linux x64 Debug
args: rm -f target/linux-x64/debug/CMakeCache.txt && rm -rf target/linux-x64/debug/CMakeFiles && cmake --preset linux-x64-debug && cmake --build --preset linux-x64-debug

tasks.label: Build: Linux x64 Release
args: rm -f target/linux-x64/release/CMakeCache.txt && rm -rf target/linux-x64/release/CMakeFiles && cmake --preset linux-x64-release && cmake --build --preset linux-x64-release

tasks.label: Build: Windows x64 Debug
args: if exist target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeCache.txt del /Q target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeCache.txt >nul 2>nul & if exist target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeFiles rmdir /S /Q target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeFiles >nul 2>nul & cmake --preset windows-x64-debug && cmake --build --preset windows-x64-debug

"${MAGLEV_WINDOWS_CMD:-cmd.exe}" /C "if exist target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeCache.txt del /Q target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeCache.txt >nul 2>nul & if exist target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeFiles rmdir /S /Q target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeFiles >nul 2>nul & cmake --preset windows-x64-debug && cmake --build --preset windows-x64-debug"

tasks.label: Build: Windows x64 Release
args: if exist target\windows-x64\release\CMakeCache.txt del /Q target\windows-x64\release\CMakeCache.txt >nul 2>nul & if exist target\windows-x64\release\CMakeFiles rmdir /S /Q target\windows-x64\release\CMakeFiles >nul 2>nul & cmake --preset windows-x64-release && cmake --build --preset windows-x64-release

"${MAGLEV_WINDOWS_CMD:-cmd.exe}" /C "if exist target\windows-x64\release\CMakeCache.txt del /Q target\windows-x64\release\CMakeCache.txt >nul 2>nul & if exist target\windows-x64\release\CMakeFiles rmdir /S /Q target\windows-x64\release\CMakeFiles >nul 2>nul & cmake --preset windows-x64-release && cmake --build --preset windows-x64-release"
